penalties.description: Video title explicitly states 'SLIPPING KNOT' indicating knot failure under tension.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models identified knot slippage. Claude correctly identified this as a demonstration video rather than a timed performance based on the video title. GPT incorrectly attempted to score an incomplete demonstration. Following Claude's interpretation that this is an educational demonstration of knot failure, not a scoreable performance.

disagreements.rationale: Claude correctly identified this as a demonstration video showing knot failure, not a timed performance attempt. The video title indicates this is educational content about slipping knots.
No time score should be awarded for a demonstration video that is not a performance attempt.
Demonstration videos showing technique failures should not receive performance scores.
